Entry.TransNCS: The analyses of the Patterson function reveals a significant off-origin peak that is 39.81 % of the origin peak, indicating pseudo-translational symmetry. The chance of finding a peak of this or larger height by random in a structure without pseudo-translational symmetry is equal to 3.0017e-04. The detected translational NCS is most likely also responsible for the elevated intensity ratio. See the relevant section of the logfile for more details.

program.name: percentiles
program.version: 20250101.v01 (using entries in the PDB archive January 1st 2025)
